channel.title: Austin Smith
channel.description: Notes, experiments, and breakdowns of things I'm building and learning in cybersecurity and cloud identity.

item.title: Lessons from Studying Cloud Identity
item.description: What certification prep reveals about real-world architecture decisions.

item.title: Building a Security-Focused Homelab
item.description: Designing a local lab for testing Azure, virtualization, and LLM workloads.

item.title: Identity as the Modern Control Plane
item.description: Exploring why identity is the foundation of cloud security architecture.
